details.productUrlName: Phial of Galadriel Extended Art Surge Foil

customAttributes.description:
If you would draw a card while you have no cards in hand, draw two cards instead.
If you would gain life while you have 5 or less life, you gain twice that much life instead.
T: Add one mana of any color.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 11/3/2023. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
customAttributes.flavorText: <em>"May it be a light to you in dark places, when all other lights go out."
